title: pyrus dracofolia
intro: Pyrus dracofolia, also known as the Dragon Apple Tree, is a rare species of deciduous tree belonging to the Rosaceae family. The tree is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower fever, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The extracts from the Pyrus dracofolia have been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Pyrus dracofolia include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its health benefits.
